stemHtml: An aerodrome reports that the output of its lighting system is 38 candelas. Which of the following is the correct definition of a candela?

options.a: The light output measured at 10 feet from a candle made of whale fat.
options.b: A measure of the wasted energy due to sound.
options.c: This unit is not standard and may be aerodrome specific.
options.d: The light has a CP (Candle Power) of 38.
